CREATE TABLE test.hits (SearchEngineID Int32, Referer String);
SELECT transform(SearchEngineID, [2, 3], ['Yandex', 'Google'], 'Other') AS title, count() AS c FROM test.hits WHERE SearchEngineID != 0 GROUP BY title ORDER BY c DESC;
SELECT transform(Referer, ['http://yandex.ru', 'http://google.ru'], ['www.yandex', 'example.com'], 'Unknown') AS s, count() AS c FROM test.hits GROUP BY s ORDER BY c DESC;
SELECT transform(SearchEngineID, [1, 2, 3, 4], ['None', 'Yandex', 'Google', 'Other'], 'Unknown') AS title, count() AS c FROM test.hits GROUP BY title;

SELECT transform(domain(Referer), ['yandex.ru', 'google.ru', 'vkontakte.ru'], ['www.yandex', 'example.com', 'vk.com']) AS transformed_ref, COUNT() AS c FROM test.hits GROUP BY transformed_ref ORDER BY c DESC LIMIT 10;
CREATE TABLE test.referrals (id Int32, referrer String);
SELECT t.title, r.referrer FROM (SELECT transform(SearchEngineID, [2, 3], ['Yandex', 'Google'], 'Other') AS title FROM test.hits) AS t JOIN test.referrals AS r ON t.title = r.referrer;
WITH transform(Referer, ['yandex.ru', 'google.ru'], ['www.yandex', 'example.com'], 'Unknown') AS transformed FROM test.hits WHERE transformed != 'Unknown' GROUP BY transformed;

SELECT transform(SearchEngineID, [1, 2], ['Search1', 'Search2'], 'Not Found') AS transformed_id, COUNT() AS c FROM (SELECT SearchEngineID FROM test.hits UNION ALL SELECT 4 AS SearchEngineID) GROUP BY transformed_id;
